title: Na+/K+-ATPase
buzzwords: Stimulated by insulin and beta-2 agonists
Exchanges 3 Na+ out for 2 K+ in

title: Insulin and Beta-2 Agonist K+ Shifts
buzzwords: Hormonal drivers of transcellular cation shift
Lower serum levels without changing total body stores
Used acutely to treat dangerous hyperkalemia
Beta-2 receptor activation shifts K+ intracellularly

title: Acid-Base Effects on Potassium
buzzwords: Also modulates distal nephron channel permeability
Lactic acidosis worsens elevated serum levels
Luminal H+ secretion inhibits tubular K+ secretion
Acidemia drives K+ out as H+ enters cells
Alkalemia causes hypokalemia; acidemia causes hyperkalemia

title: Proximal and TAL K+ Reabsorption
buzzwords: Filtered load far exceeds dietary intake
Paracellular movement driven by solvent drag
Apical K+ recycling supports loop NKCC2 function

title: ROMK and Aldosterone-Driven Principal Cell Secretion
buzzwords: Upregulates ENaC and basolateral pump together
Blocked by ACE inhibitors, ARBs, spironolactone
Renal outer medullary K+ channel in cortical collecting duct
Aldosterone-driven ROMK secretion in principal cells

title: BK (Maxi-K) Flow-Dependent K+ Channels
buzzwords: Recruited during high tubular delivery states
Explains kaliuresis with loop and thiazide diuretics
Furosemide-induced hypokalemia partly via this channel
BK/Maxi-K channel driven by tubular flow rate
